title: Support - Device page Go button
scenario: "Go" button on Device page in Support section does not open the Poly Contact Support URL in browser
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Support section.
Tap on the Device page to view device details (name, product ID, serial number, software version, headset revision, last connected).
Locate and tap the 'Go' button on the Device page.
expected: The Poly Contact Support page opens in the device's default browser at the expected URL.
